test.details: 184 tests passed, but 18 teardown errors persist due to Windows file locking (PermissionError when deleting temp database files). Also 9 deprecation warnings about datetime.utcnow() remain. The actual test logic passes, but teardown cleanup fails on Windows.

typecheck.details: mypy still not installed in environment

lint.details: flake8 still not installed in environment

reviewsSummary.note: No new features completed since round 1. Fix features (m1-fix-1, m1-fix-2, m1-fix-3) are still pending.

blockingIssues.description: Test suite still has 18 teardown errors due to Windows file locking issues (PermissionError when deleting temp database files). While the actual tests pass, the teardown failures indicate improper resource cleanup that could cause issues in production. Fix feature created but not yet implemented.
blockingIssues.recommendation: Implement m1-fix-1: Fix test fixtures to properly close database connections before cleanup. Use explicit db.close() or ensure context managers fully exit before attempting file deletion.

blockingIssues.description: mypy and flake8 are still not installed in the environment, preventing type checking and linting validation. These are essential code quality tools that should be available. Fix feature created but not yet implemented.
blockingIssues.recommendation: Implement m1-fix-2: Add mypy and flake8 to requirements.txt or create a requirements-dev.txt file with development dependencies.

blockingIssues.description: Code still uses deprecated datetime.utcnow() which is scheduled for removal in future Python versions. 9 deprecation warnings in kiro/core/auth.py lines 1218, 1405, 1406, 1429. Fix feature created but not yet implemented.
blockingIssues.recommendation: Implement m1-fix-3: Replace datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(datetime.UTC) throughout the codebase.
